---
title: "Page Not Found"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero" style="min-height:80vh;display:flex;align-items:center;">
  <div class="container" style="text-align:center;">
    <p style="font-size:8rem;font-weight:800;line-height:1;margin-bottom:0.25em;" class="gr">404</p>
    <h1>Page not found</h1>
    <p>The page you're looking for has moved, been removed, or never existed.<br>Here are some places to start instead.</p>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;margin-top:2.5rem;">
      <a href="/" class="m-b">Home</a>
      <a href="/services/" class="m-b" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--gr);color:var(--gr);">Services</a>
      <a href="/academy/" class="m-b" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--gr);color:var(--gr);">Academy</a>
      <a href="/contact.html" class="m-b" style="background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--gr);color:var(--gr);">Contact</a>
    </div>
    <p style="margin-top:2rem;opacity:.7;">Or <a href="https://cal.com/chenist" target="_blank" style="color:var(--gr);">book a call</a> and we'll point you in the right direction.</p>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
